changeSet.author: hisab-erp
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION app_current_tenant() RETURNS uuid LANGUAGE sql STABLE AS $$ SELECT NULLIF(current_setting('app.current_tenant', true), '')::uuid $$;

changeSet.author: hisab-erp
hisab-erp
changeSet.comment: We do NOT grant BYPASSRLS to the app role. Cross-tenant operations must explicitly clear app.current_tenant (NULL = bypass per the policy WHERE clause). The role used by Liquibase migrations (DDL phase) typically owns the tables and implicitly bypasses RLS for ALTER/DROP — this is fine.
